EXAMPLEID01.title: House of the Dragon S3E1 | Inside the Episode
EXAMPLEID01.text: [00:10] Inside House of the Dragon Season 3 Episode 1. [00:30] We start at Dragonstone, where Rhaenyra Targaryen is mourning her losses but steeling herself for the war. She is gathering her council to plan their next moves. [01:15] Daemon Targaryen has seized Harrenhal, but he is facing strange visions and nightmares within the dark castle. [02:00] Meanwhile, in King's Landing, Alicent Hightower finds herself politically sidelined. Her son, Aegon II, has grown increasingly paranoid, and Aemond Targaryen is consolidating power. [02:45] In this episode, we see Rhaenyra making a desperate appeal for peace, but both sides are already too deep in blood. The dragons are ready, and the armies are marching.

EXAMPLEID02.title: House of the Dragon S3E1 | Sneak Peek
EXAMPLEID02.text: [00:15] A sneak peek of the premiere episode. Rhaenyra Targaryen speaks with Mysaria in the map room. [00:45] Mysaria says, 'The smallfolk in King's Landing are whispers in the dark, my Queen. They fear the dragons, but they hunger more. Alicent Hightower can no longer calm them.' [01:30] Rhaenyra responds, 'I do not wish to burn them, Mysaria. But Aegon sits on my father's throne.' [02:15] In King's Landing, Aegon demands Cole march to the Riverlands immediately.

EXAMPLEID03.title: House of the Dragon S3E1 | Official Podcast
EXAMPLEID03.text: [00:20] Welcome to the official House of the Dragon Podcast. Today we are talking about S3E1, the premiere. [00:50] One of the major scenes is Corlys Velaryon standing on the docks of Driftmark, inspecting the sea snake fleet. He is preparing the blockade of the Gullet. [01:40] This is a massive moment of foreshadowing. As book readers know, the blockade of the Gullet will lead to the devastating Battle of the Gullet in Episode 3, where the Triarchy fleet ambushes the Velaryon ships, and it will end in the tragic death of Jacaerys Velaryon on his dragon Vermax. [02:30] But for now, in Episode 1, Corlys is just setting the pieces, hoping the blockade will starve King's Landing without a drop of blood.

EXAMPLEID04.title: House of the Dragon S3E2 | Inside the Episode
EXAMPLEID04.text: [00:15] Inside House of the Dragon Season 3 Episode 2. The Riverlands are falling into chaos. [00:45] Ser Criston Cole leads the Green armies, marching toward Harrenhal to root out Daemon. [01:30] Daemon Targaryen, occupying Harrenhal, struggles to maintain order among the Riverlords, specifically dealing with the ancient feud between the Blackwoods and Brackens. [02:15] In King's Landing, Aemond Targaryen assumes more authority as Aegon's paranoia deepens. Alicent Hightower is sidelined and feels the war is escaping her control.

EXAMPLEID05.title: House of the Dragon S3E2 | Sneak Peek
EXAMPLEID05.text: [00:10] A sneak peek of S3E2. A confrontation between Ser Criston Cole and the Riverlords. [00:40] Cole demands, 'You will swear fealty to King Aegon II, or your lands will burn.' [01:20] Meanwhile, Daemon Targaryen talks to Ser Simon Strong at Harrenhal about the curse of the castle and his sleepless nights.

EXAMPLEID06.title: House of the Dragon S3E2 | Official Podcast
EXAMPLEID06.text: [00:15] Talking about the events of S3E2. Criston Cole's campaign in the Riverlands is a major turning point. [00:55] This campaign will culminate in the battle at Burning Mill. [01:35] Crucially, this campaign foreshadows the devastating dragon battle at Rook's Rest in Episode 4, where Rhaenys Velaryon on Meleys will fight Sunfyre and Vhagar, leading to Rhaenys's heroic death and Aegon II being severely burned. [02:20] Cole's movements are setting up that deadly trap for the Blacks' dragons.
